channel.title: mbAInewsletter
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from mbAInewsletter, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Japan, Emerging Markets ETFs Attract Fresh Inflows Amid Trump's Tariff Surprise
item.description: Japan ETF inflows climb while Emerging Markets gain traction as Trump tariff headlines reshape global investment flows. Importance Rank: 1 read more
